author: Frosty40
name: The Stinky Frost Recipe
blurb: Int6 QAT with FP16 tied embeddings, MLP hidden=1344, SmearGate bigram blending, BigramHash (4096 buckets, dim=128), orthogonal weight initialization, Muon WD=0.01, early QAT at 25%, sliding window eval stride=64. 9L/512d with GQA (8 heads, 4 KV). Trained at seq_len=1024 with 524K batch tokens, 600s wallclock on 8xH100.
